what: ggwindrose — Wind Rose Geom for ggplot2
title: ggwindrose — Wind Rose Geom for ggplot2
text: ggwindrose extends ggplot2 wind rose geom bins wind direction speed observations direction--speed frequency table using custom Stat/Geom pair.

title: ggwindrose — Wind Rose Geom for ggplot2
text: geom_windrose() — stacked frequency bars, fully compatible facet_wrap() coord_windrose() — polar coordinates: North top, clockwise scale_x_windrose() — compass labels (4, 8, 16 points) scale_y_windrose() — radial frequency axis, starts 0 scale_fill_windrose() — sequential manual colour scale guide_windrose() — legend automatic calm-% footer theme_windrose() — opt-minimal theme (axis clutter)

title: ggwindrose — Wind Rose Geom for ggplot2
code: # Development version from GitHub # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("yourusername/ggwindrose")

title: ggwindrose — Wind Rose Geom for ggplot2
code: library(ggwindrose) library(ggplot2)  ggplot(wind, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_y_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(name = "Speed (m/s)") +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose() #> Warning: Removed 5 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).

title: ggwindrose — Wind Rose Geom for ggplot2
code: library(patchwork)  p16 <- ggplot(wind, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose(n_dir = 16) +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose("16pt") +   scale_y_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(name = "Speed (m/s)") +   ggtitle("16 sectors") +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose()  p8 <- ggplot(wind, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose(n_dir = 8) +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose("8pt") +   scale_y_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(name = "Speed (m/s)") +   ggtitle("8 sectors") +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose()  p16 + p8 #> Warning: Removed 5 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`). #> Removed 5 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).

title: ggwindrose — Wind Rose Geom for ggplot2
code: ggplot(wind, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose(speed_breaks = c(0.5, 2, 4, 6, 8, Inf)) +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_y_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(name = "Speed (m/s)") +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose() #> Warning: Removed 4 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).

title: ggwindrose — Wind Rose Geom for ggplot2
text: calm-% footer added automatically legend. Calm winds (speed ≤ 0.5 m/s default) excluded bars counted frequency denominator.
code: ggplot(wind, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_y_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(     name  = "Speed (m/s)",     guide = guide_windrose(       calm_text = windrose_calm_pct(wind$wspd, label = "Calme : ")     )   ) +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose() #> Warning: Removed 5 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).

title: ggwindrose — Wind Rose Geom for ggplot2
code: p_blues <- ggplot(wind, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_y_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(palette = "Blues", name = "Speed (m/s)") +   ggtitle("palette = 'Blues'") +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose()  p_spectral <- ggplot(wind, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_y_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(     colors = hcl.colors(5, "Spectral", rev = TRUE),     name   = "Speed (m/s)"   ) +   ggtitle("hcl.colors('Spectral')") +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose()  p_blues + p_spectral #> Warning: Removed 5 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`). #> Removed 5 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).

title: ggwindrose — Wind Rose Geom for ggplot2
text: panel independently computes frequencies calm percentage.
code: library(dplyr) #>  #> Attaching package: 'dplyr' #> The following objects are masked from 'package:stats': #>  #>     filter, lag #> The following objects are masked from 'package:base': #>  #>     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union  wind |>   mutate(season = case_when(     month %in% c(12, 1, 2)  ~ "DJF",     month %in% c(3,  4, 5)  ~ "MAM",     month %in% c(6,  7, 8)  ~ "JJA",     month %in% c(9, 10, 11) ~ "SON"   )) |>   mutate(season = factor(season, levels = c("DJF", "MAM", "JJA", "SON"))) |>   ggplot(aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_y_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(name = "Speed (m/s)") +   facet_wrap(~season) +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose() #> Warning: Removed 16 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).

what: Geom ggproto object for wind roses — GeomWindrose
title: Geom ggproto object for wind roses — GeomWindrose
text: Geom ggproto class underlying geom_windrose(). Extends GeomCol wind-rose defaults (sector borders). intended direct use.

what: Guide ggproto object for wind rose legends — GuideWindrose
title: Guide ggproto object for wind rose legends — GuideWindrose
text: Guide ggproto class underlying guide_windrose(). Extends GuideLegend render calm-wind percentage footer. intended direct use.

what: Stat ggproto object for wind roses — StatWindrose
title: Stat ggproto object for wind roses — StatWindrose
text: Stat ggproto class underlying stat_windrose(). Bins wind direction speed direction--speed frequency table. intended direct use.

what: Polar coordinate system for wind roses — coord_windrose
title: Polar coordinate system for wind roses — coord_windrose
text: Wraps ggplot2::coord_polar() following defaults: theta = "x": wind direction angular axis start = 0: North (x = 0°) 12 o'clock direction = 1: clockwise (meteorological convention)

title: Polar coordinate system for wind roses — coord_windrose
code: coord_windrose(...)

title: Polar coordinate system for wind roses — coord_windrose
text: ... Additional arguments passed ggplot2::coord_polar().

title: Polar coordinate system for wind roses — coord_windrose
text: CoordPolar object.

title: Polar coordinate system for wind roses — coord_windrose
code: # coord_windrose()

title: Wind rose layer — geom_windrose
text: Draws wind rose binning wind direction (x) speed (y) stacked frequency bars. Calm winds (speed \(\le\) calm_threshold) excluded bars counted frequency denominator.

title: Wind rose layer — geom_windrose
code: geom_windrose(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   position = "stack",   ...,   n_dir = 16,   speed_breaks = NULL,   speed_labels = NULL,   calm_threshold = 0.5,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Wind rose layer — geom_windrose
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings. minimum: aes(x = wdir, y = wspd). fill defaults after_stat(speed_class) unless overridden. data data frame. NULL inherits ggplot(). position Position adjustment. Default "stack". ... Extra parameters passed GeomWindrose StatWindrose. n_dir Number direction sectors. Default 16 (22.5°). Use 8 45° sectors. speed_breaks Numeric vector speed bin edges, NULL default meteorological progression: c(0.5, 1, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, …, Inf). last element may Inf open-ended bin. speed_labels Character vector bin labels, length length(speed_breaks) - 1. Auto-generated NULL. calm_threshold Observations speed \(\le\) value treated calm. Default 0.5. na.rm Drop NA values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; NA includes legend mapped. inherit.aes Inherit aesthetics ggplot()? Default TRUE.

title: Wind rose layer — geom_windrose
text: ggplot2 layer.

title: Wind rose layer — geom_windrose
text: theme applied. Add theme_windrose() + theme_*().

title: Wind rose layer — geom_windrose
code: library(ggplot2) set.seed(42) df <- data.frame(   wdir = sample(0:359, 500, replace = TRUE),   wspd = c(rep(0, 30), rexp(470, 0.2)) )  # Basic wind rose — 16 sectors, default speed breaks ggplot(df, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(     name  = "Speed (m/s)",     guide = guide_windrose(calm_text = windrose_calm_pct(df$wspd))   ) #> Warning: n too large, allowed maximum for palette YlOrRd is 9 #> Returning the palette you asked for with that many colors #> Warning: Removed 8 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).   # 8 sectors with a base theme ggplot(df, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose(n_dir = 8) +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(     name  = "Speed (m/s)",     guide = guide_windrose(calm_text = windrose_calm_pct(df$wspd))   ) +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose() #> Warning: n too large, allowed maximum for palette YlOrRd is 9 #> Returning the palette you asked for with that many colors #> Warning: Removed 9 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).   # Faceted by season (each panel has its own calm %) df$season <- sample(c("DJF", "MAM", "JJA", "SON"), 500, replace = TRUE) ggplot(df, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose() +   facet_wrap(~season) +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose() #> Warning: n too large, allowed maximum for palette YlOrRd is 9 #> Returning the palette you asked for with that many colors #> Warning: Removed 17 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).

what: ggwindrose: Wind Rose Geom for 'ggplot2' — ggwindrose-package
title: ggwindrose: Wind Rose Geom for 'ggplot2' — ggwindrose-package
text: Extends 'ggplot2' wind rose geom bins wind direction speed observations direction--speed frequency table using custom Stat/Geom pair. Coordinate, scale, theme helpers provided produce publication-ready wind roses following meteorological conventions (North 12 o'clock, clockwise rotation). custom guide (guide_windrose()) renders calm-wind percentage legend.

title: ggwindrose: Wind Rose Geom for 'ggplot2' — ggwindrose-package
code: library(ggplot2) set.seed(1) df <- data.frame(wdir = sample(0:359, 500, replace = TRUE),                  wspd = c(rep(0, 30), rexp(470, 0.2)))  ggplot(df, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(     name  = "Speed (m/s)",     guide = guide_windrose(calm_text = windrose_calm_pct(df$wspd))   ) +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose()

title: ggwindrose: Wind Rose Geom for 'ggplot2' — ggwindrose-package
text: Maintainer: Ousmane Ouedraogo oousmane@proton.

what: Legend guide with automatic calm-wind footer — guide_windrose
title: Legend guide with automatic calm-wind footer — guide_windrose
text: Extends ggplot2::guide_legend() render calm-wind percentage legend colour boxes.

title: Legend guide with automatic calm-wind footer — guide_windrose
code: guide_windrose(calm_text = NULL, title = ggplot2::waiver(), ...)

title: Legend guide with automatic calm-wind footer — guide_windrose
text: calm_text character(1) NULL. Footer text. NULL (default), calm percentage extracted automatically StatWindrose layer data. title character(1) ggplot2::waiver(). Legend title. ... Additional arguments forwarded ggplot2::guide_legend().

title: Legend guide with automatic calm-wind footer — guide_windrose
text: GuideWindrose ggproto object.

title: Legend guide with automatic calm-wind footer — guide_windrose
text: calm percentage extracted automatically StatWindrose layer data — need compute pass manually. Just use guide_windrose() arguments. may still override footer text via calm_text needed (e.g. translated label different threshold). Requires ggplot2 >= 3.5.0.

title: Legend guide with automatic calm-wind footer — guide_windrose
code: library(ggplot2) set.seed(1) df <- data.frame(wdir = sample(0:359, 300, replace = TRUE),                  wspd = c(rep(0, 20), rexp(280, 0.2)))  # Calm % added automatically — no df$wspd needed ggplot(df, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(name = "Speed (m/s)") +   theme_windrose() #> Warning: n too large, allowed maximum for palette YlOrRd is 9 #> Returning the palette you asked for with that many colors #> Warning: Removed 5 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).   # Override the footer label (e.g. French) ggplot(df, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose(     name  = "Vitesse (m/s)",     guide = guide_windrose(calm_text = windrose_calm_pct(df$wspd,                                                          label = "Calme : "))   ) +   theme_windrose() #> Warning: n too large, allowed maximum for palette YlOrRd is 9 #> Returning the palette you asked for with that many colors #> Warning: Removed 5 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).

what: Fill scale for wind speed classes — scale_fill_windrose
title: Fill scale for wind speed classes — scale_fill_windrose
text: Provides either named ColorBrewer palette (ggplot2::scale_fill_brewer()) fully manual colour vector (ggplot2::scale_fill_manual()). Use guide argument guide_windrose() add calm-% footer legend.

title: Fill scale for wind speed classes — scale_fill_windrose
code: scale_fill_windrose(   palette = "YlOrRd",   colors = NULL,   name = "Speed",   guide = NULL,   ... )

title: Fill scale for wind speed classes — scale_fill_windrose
text: palette character(1). ColorBrewer palette. Default "YlOrRd". Ignored colors NULL. colors Character vector hex colours manual scale. NULL (default), palette used. name Legend title. Default "Speed". guide Guide object. Default guide_windrose(), automatically extracts displays calm-% footer. ... Extra arguments passed underlying scale function.

title: Fill scale for wind speed classes — scale_fill_windrose
text: Scale object.

title: Fill scale for wind speed classes — scale_fill_windrose
code: # ColorBrewer palette # scale_fill_windrose()  # With calm-% footer in the legend # scale_fill_windrose( #   guide = guide_windrose(calm_text = windrose_calm_pct(df$wspd)) # )  # Manual colours # scale_fill_windrose( #   colors = c("#ffffcc", "#fed976", "#fd8d3c", "#e31a1c") # )

what: Compass-point x scale for wind roses — scale_x_windrose
title: Compass-point x scale for wind roses — scale_x_windrose
text: Sets x-axis breaks labels standard compass points, limits fixed [0, 360] rose forms complete circle.

code: scale_x_windrose(compass = c("8pt", "4pt", "16pt"), ...)

title: Compass-point x scale for wind roses — scale_x_windrose
text: compass character(1). Compass resolution: "8pt" (default): N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW (45° spacing) "4pt": N, E, S, W (90° spacing) "16pt": N, NNE, NE, ENE, … (22.5° spacing) ... Additional arguments passed ggplot2::scale_x_continuous().

title: Compass-point x scale for wind roses — scale_x_windrose
text: ScaleContinuous object.

title: Compass-point x scale for wind roses — scale_x_windrose
code: # scale_x_windrose()        # 8-point compass (default) # scale_x_windrose("4pt")   # 4-point compass # scale_x_windrose("16pt")  # 16-point compass

title: Wind rose stat — stat_windrose
text: Bins wind direction (x) speed (y) direction--speed frequency table. Calm winds (speed \(\le\) calm_threshold) excluded bars kept denominator.

title: Wind rose stat — stat_windrose
code: stat_windrose(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   geom = "col",   position = "stack",   ...,   n_dir = 16,   speed_breaks = NULL,   speed_labels = NULL,   calm_threshold = 0.5,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Wind rose stat — stat_windrose
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings. minimum: aes(x = wdir, y = wspd). fill defaults after_stat(speed_class) unless overridden. data data frame. NULL inherits ggplot(). geom Geom use. Default "col". position Position adjustment. Default "stack". ... Extra parameters passed GeomWindrose StatWindrose. n_dir Number direction sectors. Default 16 (22.5°). Use 8 45° sectors. speed_breaks Numeric vector speed bin edges, NULL default meteorological progression: c(0.5, 1, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, …, Inf). last element may Inf open-ended bin. speed_labels Character vector bin labels, length length(speed_breaks) - 1. Auto-generated NULL. calm_threshold Observations speed \(\le\) value treated calm. Default 0.5. na.rm Drop NA values silently? Default FALSE. show.legend Logical; NA includes legend mapped. inherit.aes Inherit aesthetics ggplot()? Default TRUE.

title: Wind rose stat — stat_windrose
text: stat used internally geom_windrose(). Use stat_windrose() directly need non-default geom.

title: Wind rose stat — stat_windrose
text: after_stat(y) Frequency % observations (incl. calm). after_stat(speed_class) Ordered factor speed bin labels. after_stat(calm_pct) Calm percentage, constant across panel.

title: Wind rose stat — stat_windrose
code: library(ggplot2) set.seed(1) df <- data.frame(wdir = sample(0:359, 300, replace = TRUE),                  wspd = c(rep(0, 20), rexp(280, 0.2)))  # Access calm_pct via after_stat() ggplot(df, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   stat_windrose(aes(fill = after_stat(speed_class)), width = 22.5) +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() #> Warning: Removed 5 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_col()`).

what: Minimal theme adjustments for wind rose plots — theme_windrose
title: Minimal theme adjustments for wind rose plots — theme_windrose
text: Returns ggplot2::theme() object : removes axis titles y-axis text / ticks makes compass labels bold

title: Minimal theme adjustments for wind rose plots — theme_windrose
code: theme_windrose()

title: Minimal theme adjustments for wind rose plots — theme_windrose
text: theme object.

title: Minimal theme adjustments for wind rose plots — theme_windrose
text: Add + theme_windrose(). theme applied default inside ggwindrose function.

title: Minimal theme adjustments for wind rose plots — theme_windrose
code: library(ggplot2) set.seed(1) df <- data.frame(wdir = sample(0:359, 300, replace = TRUE),                  wspd = rexp(300, 0.2))  # theme_windrose() alone ggplot(df, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose() +   theme_windrose() #> Warning: n too large, allowed maximum for palette YlOrRd is 9 #> Returning the palette you asked for with that many colors #> Warning: Removed 7 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).   # Combined with a base theme (order matters: base first, then windrose) ggplot(df, aes(x = wdir, y = wspd)) +   geom_windrose() +   coord_windrose() +   scale_x_windrose() +   scale_fill_windrose() +   theme_minimal() +   theme_windrose() #> Warning: n too large, allowed maximum for palette YlOrRd is 9 #> Returning the palette you asked for with that many colors #> Warning: Removed 7 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range #> (`geom_windrose()`).

title: Hourly wind observations — wind
text: Hourly wind speed direction records

title: Hourly wind observations — wind
code: wind

title: Hourly wind observations — wind
text: data frame 6 variables: year Integer. Year observation. month Integer. Month observation (1–12). day Integer. Day observation (1–31). hour Integer. Hour observation (0–23, UTC). wspd Numeric. Wind speed (m/s). wdir Numeric. Wind direction (degrees, 0 = North, clockwise).

title: Hourly wind observations — wind
text: ERA5 hourly reanalysis sample data.

what: Compute a calm-wind label for use in guide_windrose() — windrose_calm_pct
title: Compute a calm-wind label for use in guide_windrose() — windrose_calm_pct
text: Returns formatted string (e.g. "Calm: 6.0%") pass calm_text guide_windrose().

title: Compute a calm-wind label for use in guide_windrose() — windrose_calm_pct
code: windrose_calm_pct(wspd, threshold = 0.5, digits = 1, label = "Calm: ")

title: Compute a calm-wind label for use in guide_windrose() — windrose_calm_pct
text: wspd Numeric vector wind speeds. threshold Observations speed \(\le\) threshold considered calm. Default 0.5. digits Number decimal places. Default 1. label Label prefix. Default "Calm: ".

title: Compute a calm-wind label for use in guide_windrose() — windrose_calm_pct
text: character(1) string, e.g. "Calm: 6.0%".

title: Compute a calm-wind label for use in guide_windrose() — windrose_calm_pct
code: x <- c(0, 0, 0.3, 1.2, 3.4, 5.6) windrose_calm_pct(x)                   # "Calm: 50.0%" #> [1] "Calm: 50.0%" windrose_calm_pct(x, threshold = 1.0)  # includes 0.3 in calm #> [1] "Calm: 50.0%" windrose_calm_pct(x, label = "Calme: ") #> [1] "Calme: 50.0%"

title: ggwindrose 0.1.0
text: Initial release.

title: ggwindrose 0.1.0
text: geom_windrose() — stacked frequency bar layer wind roses; supports n_dir, speed_breaks, speed_labels, calm_threshold. stat_windrose() — underlying stat bins wind direction × speed frequency table; exposes after_stat(speed_class) after_stat(calm_pct). coord_windrose() — coord_polar() pre-configured meteorological convention (North top, clockwise). scale_x_windrose() — compass-point x-axis labels (4-, 8-, 16-point). scale_y_windrose() — radial frequency axis starting 0. scale_fill_windrose() — ColorBrewer manual fill scale speed classes. guide_windrose() — legend guide automatic calm-% footer. windrose_calm_pct() — format calm-wind percentage label string. theme_windrose() — opt-minimal theme (axis clutter, bold compass labels).

title: ggwindrose 0.1.0
text: wind — hourly ERA5 reanalysis sample dataset wdir, wspd, year, month, day, hour columns.
